response.justification: Candidate has strong general software engineering experience (web, backend, some embedded C/C++ at National Instruments) but lacks the core requirements for this role: native-level Japanese proficiency is not indicated, and there is no demonstrated experience with embedded LAN-switch firmware, Linux kernel modification, MACsec/802.1X/Captive Portal, or chip-vendor SDKs. C is not listed as a primary skill, and recent work has been in TypeScript/Node.js rather than UNIX C development.
strengths: Long track record in software craftsmanship, TDD, and CI/CD across diverse stacks
Some low-level/embedded exposure at National Instruments (C/C++ for LabWindows/CVI)
Strong English communication and technical writing/teaching experience
concerns: No evidence of native-level Japanese language proficiency (hard requirement)
No demonstrated experience with embedded networking security (MACsec, 802.1X, switch firmware) or Linux kernel modification
C programming for UNIX is not a core/recent skill; recent work is web/backend in TypeScript and DLang
